The workday was unremarkable and I'm at my desk like usual.
The meeting happened; people talked; I left.
I checked off the tasks and now I'm checking off more.
I saw a few people today; nothing particular happened.
I texted back when I needed to; that's about it.
The conversation was neither good nor bad, just a conversation.
The weather is what it is; I'm walking through it.
I went outside for a bit and came back inside.
It's an ordinary day out there.
I ate lunch; it was food.
I had what was in the fridge; it was fine.
The meal happened and I'm no longer hungry.
I slept the usual amount and woke up at the usual time.
I'm neither tired nor rested; I'm just up.
I went to bed when I went to bed.
I walked because I had to walk somewhere.
I did the routine I always do; nothing notable.
My body did the thing and now it's done.
The commute was the commute.
I got from one place to another.
The trip was uneventful.
I read some headlines without really registering them.
I scrolled for a bit and put the phone down.
I half-watched the show; I have no opinion about it.
I did the dishes because they needed doing.
The laundry got folded at some point.
The apartment is the same as it was yesterday.
